gist.headline: Translating the webtoonverse
gist.blurb: Noyaku just joined the community showcase. It's a clever new app that uses AI to translate webtoons, manhwa, and novels on the fly.
gist.summary: Added Noyaku, an AI-powered translation tool for webtoons and comics, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Noyaku in the writing section to help translate their favorite manhwa, novels, and web content.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about translating webtoons/comics. Visual symbols: comic books, manga pages, translation symbols. Characters: Polly the bee reading a comic book with reading glasses, with speech bubbles showing different languages.
gist.image_prompt: A cozy pixel art scene of a tiny bee reading a glowing comic book while floating speech bubbles translate symbols. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
